title: "Dr. Seuss Grinch Santa 19"", 15900, Red & Green
features: From the best-selling children's book author Dr. Seuss and the popular film "How the Grinch Stole Christmas!"
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Sits up right thanks to his bean filled bottom
description: From the manufacturer Dr. Seuss Grinch Santa 19" From the children's book author Dr. Seuss and the popular film “How the Grinch Stole Christmas!", we bring you the troublesome creation, Dr. Seuss Santa Grinch 19In in its adorable Santa outfit. With almost 70 million books sold worldwide, The Grinch is a character loved by people of all ages. Now you can show your love for the loveable green creature with a little help from this wonderful plush. With our Dr. Seuss Santa Grinch 19In taking centre stage, this plush soft toy makes a fabulous gift for those who love the books and films.
